name: feishu-notification-module

tested.summary: User accepted the Feishu notification module after production Feishu card and long-connection button verification.

done.summary: User requested final acceptance for the requirement: 可以，那先验收这个需求吧.

notes: Requirement archived after product clarification. Checklist is waiting for user confirmation before todolist creation.
Checklist confirmed by user and todolist created.
The concrete Feishu webhook URL must be treated as a secret and must not be committed into implementation files.
Implementation completed. Focused Feishu notification and meeting request regression tests passed. Manual Feishu send verification was not executed in this run.
Extended test_project_execution.py still fails at an isolated pre-existing project execution wait_for timeout unrelated to the new notification path.
Final production acceptance passed: Feishu test cards were delivered and application form button clicks returned the expected Operation received toast via long connection.
